summary: Planning complete for GitHub issue #7. The execution plan adds a dependency-free Surface helper module, local emission/discovery tests, README documentation, and a forbidden API scan while avoiding real Surface integration, network sinks, reducer work, UI, and action execution.
next_steps: Implement src/console-foundation/surface-claim-helper.js and export it from src/console-foundation/index.js.
Add local round-trip tests that emit helper output through KontourEmitter and LocalFileSink, then read with inspectLocalKontour and getSurfaceClaimStatus.
Document the helper in README.md as an example/helper producer pattern, not a real Surface integration.
Run npm test, npm run inspect:fixtures, and the forbidden API scan from the plan.
warnings: Keep top-level producer terminology as Console producer terminology; put Surface-native actors under actor, derivedFrom, payload.data, extensions, or refs.
Persist action descriptors only as inert data; do not execute commands, open URLs, fetch resources, or mutate product-owned Surface state.
